_publications._context: Human MPNST cell line ST88-14, S462 and a patient-derived xenoline RHT92 were kindly provided by Melissa L. Fishel | human malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor S462 cells, human plexiform neurofibroma PN 04.4 cells | malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumour (MPNST) cell lines ST88-14, S462 and NF90-8 | S462 cells were human NF1–related MPNST cells (SCC414, MilliporeSigma). | cells were seeded at 1.0 × 104 (S462 cell-line) or 3.0 × 104 (2884 and 2885 cell-lines) cells/well | MPNST cell lines (STS-26T, S462, S462TY, T265) were obtained from Dr. David Largaespada's laboratory | Immortalized human Schwann cell and MPNST cell lines (S462 [ 34 ], S462-TY [ 35 ], ST8814 [ 36 ], T265 [ 37 ], and STS-26T [ 38 ]) | human MPNST cell lines (ST88-14, STS26T, S462, S462-TY, and T265) | Human MPNST cell lines S462 and T265 were described previously...NF1 associated MPNST derived from S462 but not T265 cells form solid subcutaneous tumors | We maintained MPNST cell lines ST88-14, STS26T, S520, S462, 88-3, 90-8 and YST1 | Several cell lines derived from MPNSTs were used: S462 and ST88-14 (provided by Dr Nancy Ratner) | MPNST cell lines STS26T, ST8814, ST88-3 S462, T265p21, S520, 90–8, and YST1...All cell lines were from NF1 patients except YST-1 and STS26T | ST-8814 and S462 cells were obtained from Dr. Andrew Tee (Cardiff University) | Human T265, S462, and NSF1 cell lines of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors (MPNSTs) being associated with neurofibromatosis type 1 | Human MPNST cell lines (S462, T265, and NSF1) were analyzed and have been described in detail in our previous studies | NF1-associated S462, Cellosaurus RRID: CVCL_1Y70) were maintained at 37°C | Immortalized human Schwann cell and MPNST cell lines (S462 ( 45 ), S462-TY ( 35 ), ST8814 ( 46 ), T265 ( 47 ), and STS-26T ( 36 )) | STS-26T (19), HS-PSS, HS-sch2 (20), S462 (21), and sNF96.2 (22) cell lines were previously established in other laboratories.
